title: Reserialize with gate off skips validation

steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. This scenario re-uses the happy-path staged fixture (or any existing canonical asset). Goal: confirm that `gate: off` skips the checkpoint + validation entirely and still round-trips the asset, so the operator has a fast path when they trust the input.

steps.title: Stage a clean canonical prefab (no edit)
Expected outcomes
items: gate.skipped is true (no checkpoint taken, no validation categories run)
no gate.validation / gate.delta block is populated (or it reports skipped)
the asset is still round-tripped through Unity's serializer (canonical YAML on disk)

reset.note: Prompt-only with respect to the gate (no enforcement), but still stages a disposable fixture so the demo source asset is never touched.
